summary: Tested Cosmic Bites Expo+FastAPI catering MVP end-to-end. Backend: 19/19 pytest cases pass (100%) — auth (register/login/me/profile update), all catalog endpoints (event-categories, services, menu w/ filter, portfolio w/ filter, testimonials, corporate-clients), quote estimate (no auth) and quote create + my-quotes (auth-protected with 401 enforcement). Admin seed (admin@cosmicbites.com / Admin@123) works. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844 web preview): login, registration, all 5 tabs (home/menu/quote/portfolio/profile) render correctly with seeded content. Quote builder progresses through all 6 steps, shows estimated total (₹31,250 for 50 guests Birthday + North Indian + Full Catering), and submit shows success screen + quote persists into Profile > My Quotes. Profile edit + logout work.

minor.issue: Startup log warning 'module bcrypt has no attribute __about__' — cosmetic only, password hashing/verification still works (admin login + register/login tests all pass)

issues: React Native web deprecation warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' and 'Image: style.tintColor is deprecated. Please use props.tintColor.' — cosmetic, no functional impact

action_items: (Optional) Suppress react-native-web deprecation warnings by migrating any `style.tintColor` to `props.tintColor` on <Image>, and `props.pointerEvents` to `style.pointerEvents` where used (no functional fix required).
(Optional) Upgrade passlib/bcrypt compatibility or pin bcrypt<4 to silence the __about__ warning on startup.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] and excludes _id correctly in all reads — good.
JWT 7-day expiry, bcrypt hashing, OAuth2PasswordBearer auto_error=False with manual 401 — clean implementation.
Quote pricing engine is deterministic and matches FE/BE — verified per_plate*guests + extras formula in test.
Frontend api/client.ts properly uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix. AuthContext refreshes user on app boot from token.
All interactive elements have testID attributes (verified login, register inputs and submit buttons).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — login, register, 5 tabs render, 6-step quote builder, quote submit + persistence, profile edit, logout

seed_data_creation: Registered TEST_ users via /api/auth/register during tests (prefixed test_<uuid>@cosmicbites.com). One quote was created via the FE flow and is visible in that test user's Profile > My Quotes. No production-relevant data was modified. Admin user is auto-seeded by backend on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL = https://catering-hub-81.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin login: admin@cosmicbites.com / Admin@123. Tab navigation in web preview can be done via direct URL (/home, /menu, /quote, /portfolio, /profile) — text-based tab labels are styled with letter-spacing, prefer testID or URL navigation in playwright. All interactive elements have testID. Quote builder CONTINUE/SUBMIT buttons matchable via get_by_text('CONTINUE') / get_by_text('SUBMIT'). Run backend tests with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_cosmic_bites.py -v
rca_of_issue: No blocking bugs found. Two non-blocking warnings noted (RN-web style deprecation; passlib bcrypt __about__ attribute) — both cosmetic with zero functional impact.
